# FixIt Expresso - TurboChef Speed Oven Repair Seattle

> TurboChef speed oven repair specialists in the greater Seattle area. Factory-trained technicians authorized to perform warranty and non-warranty service on all TurboChef speed oven models. 21+ years experience.

## About

FixIt Expresso specializes in repairing TurboChef commercial speed ovens for restaurants, hotels, hospitals, schools, and commercial kitchens across the greater Seattle area. We are authorized to perform both warranty and non-warranty repairs on all TurboChef models including Sota (NGO), Bullet, Encore, HhD Double Batch, i3, i5, NGC, ECO, Fire, and legacy models. We offer on-site repair within 80 miles of Seattle and drop-off service for Sota (NGO) ovens to save on travel fees.

## Contact

- Phone: 425-547-0200
- Email: services@fixitexpresso.com
- Service Area: Seattle, Bellevue, Tacoma, and surrounding areas within 80 miles
- Hours: Mon-Sat 9AM-5PM, Sun 11AM-3PM

## Services

- TurboChef speed oven repair (all models)
- MerryChef speed oven repair (eikon and conneX series)
- Error code diagnosis (F1-F10)
- Magnetron replacement
- Control board repair
- Door component service
- Preventive maintenance
- Drop-off service for Sota (NGO) ovens
- Same-day emergency service

## TurboChef Models We Repair

- Sota (also called NGO) — most common model, drop-off eligible
- Bullet / Encore — popular in Subway and fast-casual restaurants
- HhD Double Batch — used by Panera Bread
- i3 and i5 — chain restaurant and franchise models
- NGC — high-volume commercial kitchens
- ECO — energy-efficient model
- Fire — pizza and high-heat cooking
- HhC, Conveyor, Tornado, C3, C4, Plexor — legacy models

## MerryChef Speed Ovens (Secondary Specialty)

In addition to TurboChef, we also repair MerryChef speed ovens in the Seattle area. TurboChef is our primary specialty, but our technicians are experienced with MerryChef diagnostics and repairs including heating issues, magnetron failures, control board problems, door faults, and error codes.

MerryChef models we service:

- eikon e1s, e2s — compact countertop speed ovens
- eikon e3, e4, e6 — higher-power eikon models
- conneX 11, 12, 16 — modern connected high-power line

## Common TurboChef Error Codes

- F1: Blower Running Status Bad
- F2: Cook Temperature Low
- F3: Magnetron Current Low
- F4: Door Monitor Defective
- F5: Magnetron Over Temperature
- F6: EC Temp High
- F7: RTD Failure (temperature probe)
- F8: High Limit Tripped / Heat Low
- F9: Belt Failure / Temp High
- F10: Communication Failure
